headline: TV Viewership Falls Below 50% for First Time in History
context: Nielsen data shows traditional television viewership fell below 50% of population for first time in 2025.

cards.big: Traditional TV viewership falls below 50% for first time ever
cards.sub: Streaming platforms now capture majority of entertainment consumption

cards.big: Netflix Disney Plus and 5 locals serve 12.8 million subscribers
cards.sub: Average Malaysian streams 2.8 hours daily versus 1.5 hours traditional TV

cards.big: TV advertising revenue fell 25% to RM1.8 billion from RM2.4 billion in 2022
cards.sub: Digital advertising surpassed TV for first time reaching RM3.2 billion

cards.big: RTM news viewership dropped from 2.8 million to 1.2 million in 3 years
cards.sub: Government broadcaster losing relevance as youth consume news on social media

cards.big: TV decline tests whether public broadcasters can remain relevant in the streaming era
TV viewership below 50% for the first time. Broadcast decline accelerates when content follows audiences online.
